---
title: Untitled
output-file: DHSC_word_example
format:
  DHSC-docx:
    date: 09/08/2024
    toc: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

This template is an example of how to write a report in the **DHSC** style.

When using the DHSC template, use one hash symbol for headings and two hash symbols for subheadings and so on. Up to five levels of heading can be used (five hash symbols).

This is an example of adding a link [quarto website](https://quarto.org/docs/output-formats/html-basics.html).

# A heading

Some text here....

## A subheading

Text under a subheading...

# Further heading

This paragraph has bullet points

-   First bullet point

-   Second bullet point

Numbered bullet points

1.  line 1

2.  line 2

## Second level subheading

Here is example of a table

| Col1 | Col2 | Col3 |
|------|------|------|
| a    | 1    | 4    |
| b    | 2    | 5    |
| c    | 3    | 6    |

: This is the table caption

### Third level subheading

Add a footnote [^1]

[^1]: This is the footnote

#### Fourth level subheading

![image caption](example_image.png){fig-alt="here is the alt text"}

##### Fifth level subheading

Sixth level subheading

##
